_notes: lookback_days = how far back per pull. 90 = catches 2026 trends, ignores stale.
min_outlier_score = views_per_day / channel_baseline_views_per_day. 3.0 = breakout, 5.0 = major, 10.0 = viral.
min_subs = filter out channels too small to have meaningful baselines.
baseline_min_video_age_days = ignore videos still in their algo cycle for baseline calc.
baseline_window = use last N qualifying videos to compute median.
Each entry can use either 'handle' (resolved via API) or 'channelId' (direct, skips resolution — preferred for ambiguous handles).
Bad handles auto-skip with a warning. category is purely for digest grouping.
